description: Bright Data (formerly Luminati) provides a global proxy network, residential IPs, and data collection tools for web scraping, market research, and competitive intelligence.
authentication: API key-based authentication for its services; OAuth 2.0 support for certain endpoints.
self_serve: Yes – users can sign up, purchase proxy plans, and manage accounts via the Bright Data dashboard.
api_surface: RESTful APIs for proxy management, IP rotation, and data extraction; SDKs available in Python, Node.js, and Java.
mcp: No public information on a Managed Cloud Platform (MCP) offering; primarily a SaaS proxy service.
buildability: Supports integration via API calls and SDKs; offers Docker images for proxy deployment; documentation includes code samples.
main_blocker: Limited public documentation on advanced data extraction features; some users report complexity in configuring IP rotation for large-scale projects.
